author: malele
description: Promote or demote heading levels together with all sub-headings at once, like Typora. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: malele
manifest.description: Promote or demote heading levels together with all sub-headings at once, like Typora.
manifest.name: Heading Shift

name: Heading Shift

releases.author: MaleleStudySpace
releases.description:
Initial release

- Promote heading (remove #) with all sub-headings
- Demote heading (add #) with all sub-headings  
- Skip headings inside code fences
- Preserve cursor position and scroll viewport
